days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Yasmin's Program (evening)
days.description: Full Ankle & Hips program. No run today — gym only.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.how_to: Full extension at the top; slow controlled return.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Balls of feet on weight plate edge, barbell on upper back. Rise to toes; controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: On leg extension machine. Should feel hard. Work each leg individually.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: Curl to buttocks; 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Single Leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time. Full controlled extension.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks over toes. Progress weight each session.

exercises.name: Pogo Jumps
exercises.how_to: Two-footed jumps on the spot. Minimal ground contact — light and springy on balls of feet.

exercises.name: Pogo Hops (Single-Leg)
exercises.how_to: Single-leg hops building gradually to 30+. Stop immediately if calf pain increases.

days.name: Easy Run
days.description: 4 km easy @ 5:00–5:15/km. Short and easy.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace. Note how the calves feel.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Long Run
days.description: 8 km @ 5:00–5:15/km. Conversational throughout.

exercises.name: Long Run
exercises.how_to: Genuinely conversational the whole way. Key session of the recovery week.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest — fresh legs for Wednesday intervals.

days.name: Intervals — 4 × 800 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 800 m @ 3:25–3:30/km (90s jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km. First quality session back — stop if calf tightness builds.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Let the body ease in.

exercises.name: 4 × 800 m
exercises.how_to: Hard effort — HR 165–175. 90s jog recovery between reps. Stop immediately if calves tighten.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Note how calves feel afterwards.

days.description: Full Ankle & Hips program. Gym only — no run today.

exercises.name: Leg Press

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Rise to toes; controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: Should feel hard. Both legs.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 6 km easy with 4 × 20s strides.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Conversational pace. Calves should be settling by now.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed accelerations at the end of the run. Full recovery walk between each.

days.name: Rest
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Long Run
days.description: 13 km @ 4:25/km. Comfortable aerobic effort throughout — not shuffling, not racing.

exercises.name: Long Run
exercises.how_to: Comfortable aerobic effort. HR ~145–155. Not shuffling easy, not racing — a purposeful aerobic pace. This is the biggest aerobic builder of the week.

days.name: Tennis / Cycling
days.description: Cross-training. Easy effort.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest — fresh legs for Thursday intervals.

days.name: VO2max Intervals — 4 × 1000 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 1000 m @ 3:14–3:18/km (3 min jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~10 km. Reps well above race pace — this is where the real adaptation happens.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Take the full warmup — these reps are hard.

exercises.name: 4 × 1000 m @ 3:14–3:18/km
exercises.how_to: Genuinely hard — 10 sec/km faster than race pace. HR ~170–180. The 3 min recovery is generous; use it. Consistent splits across all 4 reps matter more than going hard early.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Hard session done.

days.name: Yasmin's Program
days.description: Full Ankle & Hips program. No run today — gym only.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.how_to: Full extension at the top; slow controlled return.

exercises.name: Calf Press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Balls of feet on weight plate edge, barbell on upper back. Rise to toes; controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Seated Calf Raise
exercises.how_to: Heavy load — each rep should be demanding. Both legs.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: Curl to buttocks; 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Single Leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time. Full controlled extension.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks over toes.

exercises.name: Pogo Jumps
exercises.how_to: Two-footed jumps on the spot. Minimal ground contact — light and springy on balls of feet.

exercises.name: Pogo Hops (Single-Leg)
exercises.how_to: Building load on single-leg hops. Stop if calf pain increases.

days.name: Tennis
days.description: Tennis — keep it controlled. Structured long run tomorrow has a race-pace section.

days.name: Easy Run (or Rest)
days.description: Calves tight after Thursday intervals + Saturday tennis. Structured run deferred. Only run if calves feel settled in the morning — 5 km @ 5:15–5:30/km, flat and easy. Stop if any tightening. Rest is fine if they do not feel right.

exercises.name: 5 km easy
exercises.how_to: Truly conversational. No race pace today. Stop immediately if calves start to build. Flat route only.

days.name: Yasmin's Program + Chest/Back
days.description: Ankle & Hips with calf work removed — calves resting. Chest and back added to fill the gap.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.how_to: Full extension at the top; slow controlled return.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Drive outer leg to ~45°; slow return. Both sides.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.how_to: Curl to buttocks; 1-second pause at top; slow controlled release.

exercises.name: Leg Extension (Single Leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time. Full controlled extension.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; front knee tracks over toes.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.how_to: Pick a moderate weight — this is accessory work, not a max effort. Controlled descent to chest, full press up.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.how_to: Pull bar to upper chest; slow controlled return. Keep chest up and shoulders back.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.how_to: Drive elbows back to squeeze shoulder blades together. Slow return — don't let the weight yank you forward.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest — fresh legs for Wednesday tempo.

days.name: Speed Reps — Deferred
days.description: Speed reps deferred pending Yasmin assessment (Tue 31 Mar). Bilateral calf tightness two weeks running. Will reschedule once cleared.

days.name: Rest
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Structured Long Run
days.description: 5 km @ 4:25/km + 3 km @ 3:24/km (race pace) + 5 km @ 4:25/km. ~13 km. Race pace section extends to 3 km.

exercises.name: Section 1
exercises.how_to: Comfortable aerobic effort. HR ~145–155. Arrive at the race pace section ready.

exercises.name: Section 2 — Race Pace
exercises.how_to: 3 km at race pace on tired legs. This is the most specific training you can do. Hard but controlled.

exercises.name: Section 3
exercises.how_to: Back to aerobic pace. Proud finish.

days.name: Sharpener — 4 × 800 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 800 m @ 3:22–3:28/km (2 min jog) + 2 km cooldown. ~8 km. Legs should feel fast.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog.

exercises.name: 4 × 800 m
exercises.how_to: Sharpener pace — slightly faster than the build phase. 2 min jog recovery. Legs should feel quick.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog.

days.name: Rest
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Long Run
days.description: 14 km @ 4:25/km. Sustained aerobic effort — biggest run of the plan. No walking, no surges.

exercises.name: Long Run
exercises.how_to: Sustained aerobic effort throughout. HR ~145–155. No walking, no surges. This builds the aerobic engine that makes the last km of the race possible. Just run.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 5 km easy with 4 × 20s strides.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Very easy. Just keep the legs moving.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Relaxed race-pace accelerations.

days.name: Tune-Up Reps
days.description: 2 km warmup + 3 × 1 km @ 3:20–3:24/km (2 min jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~7 km. Keeps legs sharp mid-taper — controlled, not all-out.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog.

exercises.name: 3 × 1 km @ 3:20–3:24/km
exercises.how_to: Race pace feel — not all-out. These should feel controlled and sharp. Just a tune-up. If legs feel flat, that's normal taper tiredness — they'll be sharp on race day.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Optional 15 min walk or gentle jog.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 3 km easy + 4 × 20s strides @ race pace. Stay loose.

exercises.name: Easy Run
exercises.how_to: Very easy.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Race pace. Should feel effortless.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Taper Run — 8 × 90s
days.description: 5 min easy warmup + 8 × 90s @ 3:24/km (90s jog recovery) + 5 min easy cooldown. ~6 km. Keeps legs firing without fatigue.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. ~1 km.

exercises.name: 8 × 90s @ 3:24/km
exercises.how_to: Race pace — not all-out. These should feel controlled and familiar. This is maintenance, not fitness. Four days to the race.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Done.

days.name: Shakeout Run
days.description: 3 km very easy. Just moving the legs.

exercises.name: Shakeout
exercises.how_to: Very easy jog. No effort.

days.name: Rest Day
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 20 min easy @ 5:10/km + 4 × 20s strides @ 3:24/km. ~4 km. Prep race kit tonight — pin number on, Vaporflys out.

exercises.name: Easy Jog
exercises.how_to: Very easy. Just keep the legs from stiffening up.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Race pace. Should feel effortless today.

days.name: RACE — Battersea Park Run
days.description: Sub 17:00. Target 3:24/km. First km should feel easy — aim 3:22–3:25, then settle. Empty the tank after km 4.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: 10 min easy jog before the start. Don't sprint the first 200m.

exercises.name: Km 1
exercises.how_to: Should feel surprisingly easy. Resist the urge to go faster.

exercises.name: Km 2–4
exercises.how_to: Settle into race pace. Controlled and strong.

exercises.name: Km 5
exercises.how_to: If you have anything left after km 4, give everything you have.
